title: Restore FeedbackItem metrics aggregation
description:
Restore ongoing FeedbackItem aggregation and backfill missing AggregatedMetrics from 2026-04-24T00:00:00Z so dashboard and drawer feedback volume surfaces are current and consistent.

Definition of Done:
- FeedbackItem table streams are wired into the metrics aggregation Lambda.
- Lambda writes account, scorecard, and score scoped feedback metrics with classification metadata.
- Backfill from 2026-04-24T00:00:00Z through deployment time is complete and verified.
- Tests, deployment, push, and GitHub Actions CI pass.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text:
Implementation progress:
- Created required Kanbus epic, stories, and tasks.
- Created branch bugfix/feedbackitem-metrics-aggregation from updated develop.
- Implemented FeedbackItem stream wiring, Lambda scoped counting, editedAt/updatedAt query dedupe, scoped composite keys, and metadata mutation payloads.
- Added tests for stream config, classification, query dedupe, scoped buckets, composite keys, and mutation payloads.
- Targeted tests passed: python -m pytest plexus/cli/metrics/aggregation_test.py infrastructure/lambda_functions/metrics_aggregator/test_procedure_metrics.py infrastructure/lambda_functions/metrics_aggregator/test_feedback_metrics.py.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text:
Correction after deployment-model reminder:
- A direct CDK deploy was started from the original implementation plan, but this project deploys Amplify Gen2 changes through CI/CD.
- The local cdk deploy process was terminated.
- CloudFormation cancel-update-stack was issued for plexus-metrics-aggregation-production in us-west-2.
- Stack reached UPDATE_ROLLBACK_COMPLETE.
- Remaining work will stay on the branch as source/test changes for CI/CD; no direct backfill/deploy will be run from this session.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text:
Branch status:
- Committed fix as efe40d303 on bugfix/feedbackitem-metrics-aggregation.
- Pushed branch to origin.
- Local targeted tests passed after rollback: python -m pytest plexus/cli/metrics/aggregation_test.py infrastructure/lambda_functions/metrics_aggregator/test_procedure_metrics.py infrastructure/lambda_functions/metrics_aggregator/test_feedback_metrics.py.
- gh run list found no GitHub Actions runs for the branch push. A PR into develop is needed to run the normal CI/CD path; PR was not opened because repo policy requires explicit confirmation.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text:
Normal deployment path restored:
- Opened PR #248 into develop: https://github.com/AnthusAI/Plexus/pull/248
- CI/CD Pipeline run 25126019100 is queued on PR checks.
- No direct deploy or backfill will be run outside the normal Amplify Gen2 CI/CD process.
